title: Freshdesk <> Monday Integration not syncing description

Hi All, 
I’m setting up an integration with Freshdesk and Monday and I’m having trouble getting the Description field from Freshdesk to sync. The other fields are syncing with no issue. Screenshots of the configurations …

posts.author: LeeAccomando (Lee Accomando)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I’m setting up an integration with Freshdesk and Monday and I’m having trouble getting the Description field from Freshdesk to sync. The other fields are syncing with no issue. Screenshots of the configurations in both platforms below. Any and all thoughts are appreciated!

Screenshot 2024-08-08 at 11.39.24 AM1134×916 80.4 KB
